examples.title: Basic breadcrumbs
examples.description: Navigation trail with the final entry as the current page.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Breadcrumbs } from '@lostgradient/cinder/breadcrumbs';
</script>

<Breadcrumbs
  items={[
    { label: 'Home', href: '/' },
    { label: 'Projects', href: '/projects' },
    { label: 'Cinder', href: '/projects/cinder' },
    { label: 'Settings' },
  ]}
/>

examples.title: Custom separator
examples.description: Override the default "/" separator with any string or snippet.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Breadcrumbs } from '@lostgradient/cinder/breadcrumbs';
</script>

<Breadcrumbs
  separator="›"
  items={[
    { label: 'Home', href: '/' },
    { label: 'Library', href: '/library' },
    { label: 'Music', href: '/library/music' },
    { label: 'Albums' },
  ]}
/>
